title: Will the **high temp in NYC** be 68-69° on Mar 22, 2026?
rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded in Central Park, New York for March 22, 2026 as reported by the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), is between 68-69°, then the market resolves to Yes.
